products.name: Z750
products.descriptor: 7.5mm ultra-thin UAV servo actuator with Hall effect sensor

evidence.snippet:
![Z750](https://zeus-actuators.com/image/cache/catalog/Product/Z750_1-500x500.png "Z750")
](https://zeus-actuators.com/7.5mm/Z750)
Dimensions: 23.75mm x 7.50mm x 16.10mm Weight: 7.90g
[Z750](https://zeus-actuators.com/7.5mm/Z750)
The Z750 is suitable for miniature UAVs(unmanned aerial vehicles), which has a thickness of only 7.5mm and is equipped with a non-worn-out Hall effect angle sensor. The actuator can be perfectly installed inside the flap, which brings great convenience for the structural design of the folding wing aircraft...
